26 Secrets o( Birth Time Rectification
The tabulated list of Y ama ownership for day time as per
these opinions is given below-
Table 1: Yama lords as per Parasara
Weekday 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8
Sunday Su Mo Ma Me Ju Ve Sa -
Monday Mo Ma Me Ju Ve Sa Su -
Tuesday Ma Me Ju Ve Sa Su Mo -
Wednesday Me Ju Ve Sa· Su Mo Ma -
Thursday Ju Ve Sa Su Mo Ma Me -
Friday Ve Sa Su Mo Ma Me Ju -
Saturday Sa Su Mo Ma Me Ju Ve -
Table 2: Yama lords as per Madhaveeya
Weekday 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8
Sunday. Su Mo Ma Me Ju Ve Sa Su
Monday Mo Ma Me Ju Ve Sa Su Mo
Tuesday Ma Me Ju Ve Sa Su Mo Ma
Wednesday Me Ju Ve Sa Su Mo Ma Me
Thursday Ju Ve Sa Su Mo Ma Me Ju
Friday Ve Sa Su Mo Ma Me Ju Ve
Saturday Sa Su Mo Ma Me Ju Ve Sa
Sage Jaimini is also of the opinion that 8th Y ama of day,
as well as 8th Yama of night does not have any lord. But
Madhaveeya says that lord of 8th Yama is lord ofVara itself
and Prasnamarga says that lord of 8th Yama is Rahu.
Since astrology is an abstract subject that bypass human
